title: salix × peloritana
intro: Salix × peloritana, a hybrid willow plant, is a cross between Salix fragilis and Salix alba. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its bark, which contains salicin, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × peloritana include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as its potential to help manage symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. In herbal preparations, the bark is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, although its use should be under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional due to potential side effects and interactions.
